data.name: Document-based Question and Answers
data.description: Developed a document question answering system that utilizes Llama and LangChain for contextual and accurate answers.

data.name: Image Caption Generator
data.description: Developed an image captioning system using the BLIP model to generate detailed, context-aware captions.

data.name: Movie Reviews Classification
data.description: Developed a sentiment classification system for movie reviews using NLP techniques, achieving an F-1 score of 85.1% with a Naïve Bayes model and comprehensive features. The project involved preprocessing, feature engineering, and comparative analysis with models like Decision Trees and Transformers.

data.name: Vision Mart
data.description: Developed an integrated platform to unify Vision Books, Vision Flicks, Vision Music, and Vision Mart. Utilized Snowflake for data warehousing, DBT for data transformation, and Power BI for creating dashboards and business analytics. The framework includes data integration, processing, and visualization to improve operations and customer experience.

data.name: Energy Consumption Analysis
data.description: Developed predictive models for energy consumption using XGBoost with hyperparameter tuning, achieving 88.58% accuracy. Created an interactive Shiny app for visualizing energy usage patterns and the impact of temperature increases, utilizing R and Jupyter Notebook for analysis and visualization.

data.name: Virtual Business Card
data.description: Developed an interactive virtual business card for RSR Restaurant using Unity and C#. The application integrates Augmented Reality (AR) to create an engaging digital business card experience, enhancing user interaction with the restaurant’s branding.
